allow: Bash(timeout 15 node -e " require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const SolaceClient = require\('./src/solace-client'\); const { parseSmesMessage } = require\('./src/smes-parser'\); const solace = new SolaceClient\({ host: process.env.SOLACE_HOST, vpn: process.env.SOLACE_VPN, username: process.env.SOLACE_USERNAME, password: process.env.SOLACE_PASSWORD, queue: process.env.SOLACE_QUEUE, }\); let total = 0, parsed = 0, failed = 0; const topicTypes = {}; solace.on\('message', \(payload, topic\) => { total++; // extract topic type \(e.g. AT, AD, SE, SH\) const parts = \(topic || ''\).split\('/'\); const ttype = parts[3] || 'unknown'; topicTypes[ttype] = \(topicTypes[ttype] || 0\) + 1; try { const result = parseSmesMessage\(payload\); if \(result\) parsed++; else failed++; } catch\(e\) { failed++; } }\); solace.connect\(\); setTimeout\(\(\) => { console.log\('Total messages:', total\); console.log\('Parsed OK:', parsed\); console.log\('Dropped/null:', failed\); console.log\('By topic type:', JSON.stringify\(topicTypes, null, 2\)\); process.exit\(0\); }, 12000\); ")

Bash(timeout 15 node -e " require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const SolaceClient = require\('./src/solace-client'\); const solace = new SolaceClient\({ host: process.env.SOLACE_HOST, vpn: process.env.SOLACE_VPN, username: process.env.SOLACE_USERNAME, password: process.env.SOLACE_PASSWORD, queue: process.env.SOLACE_QUEUE, }\); let dumped = {}; solace.on\('message', \(payload, topic\) => { const parts = \(topic || ''\).split\('/'\); const ttype = parts[3] || 'unknown'; if \(!dumped[ttype] && typeof payload === 'string'\) { dumped[ttype] = true; console.log\('=== ' + ttype + ' === Topic: ' + topic\); console.log\(payload.substring\(0, 3000\)\); console.log\(''\); } if \(Object.keys\(dumped\).length >= 5\) process.exit\(0\); }\); solace.connect\(\); setTimeout\(\(\) => process.exit\(0\), 12000\); ")

Bash(timeout 15 node -e " require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const SolaceClient = require\('./src/solace-client'\); const { parseSmesMessage } = require\('./src/smes-parser'\); const solace = new SolaceClient\({ host: process.env.SOLACE_HOST, vpn: process.env.SOLACE_VPN, username: process.env.SOLACE_USERNAME, password: process.env.SOLACE_PASSWORD, queue: process.env.SOLACE_QUEUE, }\); let totalMsg = 0, totalTracks = 0, failed = 0; solace.on\('message', \(payload, topic\) => { totalMsg++; try { const result = parseSmesMessage\(payload\); if \(result\) totalTracks += result.length; else failed++; } catch\(e\) { failed++; } }\); solace.connect\(\); setTimeout\(\(\) => { console.log\('Messages received:', totalMsg\); console.log\('Tracks parsed:', totalTracks\); console.log\('Dropped:', failed\); process.exit\(0\); }, 12000\); ")

Bash(timeout 20 node -e " require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const SolaceClient = require\('./src/solace-client'\); const solace = new SolaceClient\({ host: process.env.FDPS_HOST, vpn: process.env.FDPS_VPN, username: process.env.FDPS_USERNAME, password: process.env.FDPS_PASSWORD, queue: process.env.FDPS_QUEUE, }\); let count = 0; solace.on\('message', \(payload, topic\) => { if \(count < 2 && typeof payload === 'string'\) { console.log\('=== MSG ' + count + ' === Topic: ' + topic\); console.log\(payload.substring\(0, 4000\)\); console.log\(''\); count++; } if \(count >= 2\) process.exit\(0\); }\); solace.connect\(\); setTimeout\(\(\) => process.exit\(0\), 18000\); ")

Bash(timeout 15 node -e " require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const SolaceClient = require\('./src/solace-client'\); const { parseSmesMessage } = require\('./src/smes-parser'\); const solace = new SolaceClient\({ host: process.env.SOLACE_HOST, vpn: process.env.SOLACE_VPN, username: process.env.SOLACE_USERNAME, password: process.env.SOLACE_PASSWORD, queue: process.env.SOLACE_QUEUE, }\); const targetTypes = {}; const tracksByType = new Map\(\); solace.on\('message', \(payload, topic\) => { try { const tracks = parseSmesMessage\(payload\); if \(!tracks\) return; for \(const t of tracks\) { const type = t.targetType || 'null'; targetTypes[type] = \(targetTypes[type] || 0\) + 1; tracksByType.set\(t.airport + ':' + t.trackId, type\); } } catch\(e\) {} }\); solace.connect\(\); setTimeout\(\(\) => { const uniqueByType = {}; for \(const type of tracksByType.values\(\)\) { uniqueByType[type] = \(uniqueByType[type] || 0\) + 1; } console.log\('Updates by targetType:', JSON.stringify\(targetTypes, null, 2\)\); console.log\('Unique tracks by targetType:', JSON.stringify\(uniqueByType, null, 2\)\); process.exit\(0\); }, 12000\); ")

Bash(timeout 20 node -e " require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const SolaceClient = require\('./src/solace-client'\); const { parseFixmMessage } = require\('./src/fixm-parser'\); const solace = new SolaceClient\({ host: process.env.FDPS_HOST, vpn: process.env.FDPS_VPN, username: process.env.FDPS_USERNAME, password: process.env.FDPS_PASSWORD, queue: process.env.FDPS_QUEUE, }\); let count = 0; const statuses = {}; const fields = new Set\(\); solace.on\('message', \(payload, topic\) => { try { const plans = parseFixmMessage\(payload\); if \(!plans\) return; for \(const p of plans\) { count++; statuses[p.flightStatus || 'null'] = \(statuses[p.flightStatus || 'null'] || 0\) + 1; for \(const [k, v] of Object.entries\(p\)\) { if \(v !== null\) fields.add\(k\); } } } catch\(e\) {} }\); solace.connect\(\); setTimeout\(\(\) => { console.log\('Total plans:', count\); console.log\('Statuses:', JSON.stringify\(statuses, null, 2\)\); console.log\('Non-null fields seen:', [...fields].sort\(\).join\(', '\)\); process.exit\(0\); }, 15000\); ")

Bash(timeout 15 node -e " require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const SolaceClient = require\('./src/solace-client'\); const { parseFixmMessage } = require\('./src/fixm-parser'\); const solace = new SolaceClient\({ host: process.env.FDPS_HOST, vpn: process.env.FDPS_VPN, username: process.env.FDPS_USERNAME, password: process.env.FDPS_PASSWORD, queue: process.env.FDPS_QUEUE, }\); let seen = 0; solace.on\('message', \(payload, topic\) => { try { const plans = parseFixmMessage\(payload\); if \(!plans\) return; for \(const p of plans\) { if \(seen < 5\) { console.log\('alt:', p.altitude, 'spd:', p.airspeed, 'callsign:', p.callsign\); seen++; } } } catch\(e\) {} }\); // Also dump raw altitude XML from one message let rawDumped = false; solace.on\('message', \(payload\) => { if \(!rawDumped && typeof payload === 'string' && payload.includes\('requestedAltitude'\)\) { const match = payload.match\(/<requestedAltitude>[\\s\\S]*?<\\/requestedAltitude>/\); if \(match\) { console.log\('RAW ALT:', match[0]\); rawDumped = true; } } }\); solace.connect\(\); setTimeout\(\(\) => process.exit\(0\), 12000\); ")

Bash(timeout 15 node -e " require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const SolaceClient = require\('./src/solace-client'\); const solace = new SolaceClient\({ host: process.env.FDPS_HOST, vpn: process.env.FDPS_VPN, username: process.env.FDPS_USERNAME, password: process.env.FDPS_PASSWORD, queue: process.env.FDPS_QUEUE, }\); const altTypes = new Set\(\); solace.on\('message', \(payload\) => { if \(typeof payload !== 'string'\) return; const matches = payload.matchAll\(/<requestedAltitude>\\s*<\(\\w+\)/g\); for \(const m of matches\) altTypes.add\(m[1]\); }\); solace.connect\(\); setTimeout\(\(\) => { console.log\('Altitude element types seen:', [...altTypes]\); process.exit\(0\); }, 12000\); ")

Bash(timeout 15 node -e " require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const SolaceClient = require\('./src/solace-client'\); const { parseFixmMessage } = require\('./src/fixm-parser'\); const solace = new SolaceClient\({ host: process.env.FDPS_HOST, vpn: process.env.FDPS_VPN, username: process.env.FDPS_USERNAME, password: process.env.FDPS_PASSWORD, queue: process.env.FDPS_QUEUE, }\); let seen = 0; solace.on\('message', \(payload\) => { const plans = parseFixmMessage\(payload\); if \(!plans\) return; for \(const p of plans\) { if \(seen < 8\) { console.log\(p.callsign, '|', p.origin, '->', p.destination, '| alt:', p.altitude, '| spd:', p.airspeed, '| status:', p.flightStatus\); seen++; } } }\); solace.connect\(\); setTimeout\(\(\) => process.exit\(0\), 12000\); ")

Bash(timeout 15 node -e " require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const SolaceClient = require\('./src/solace-client'\); const solace = new SolaceClient\({ host: process.env.FDPS_HOST, vpn: process.env.FDPS_VPN, username: process.env.FDPS_USERNAME, password: process.env.FDPS_PASSWORD, queue: process.env.FDPS_QUEUE, }\); let dumped = false; solace.on\('message', \(payload, topic\) => { if \(!dumped && typeof payload === 'string' && topic.includes\('/ACTIVE/'\) || \(!dumped && payload.includes\('ACTIVE'\)\)\) { // find altitude-like elements const altMatch = payload.match\(/\([Aa]lt|[Cc]ruise|[Ff]light[Ll]evel\)[\\s\\S]{0,200}/\); const assignedMatch = payload.match\(/<assigned[\\s\\S]{0,500}/i\); const agreedMatch = payload.match\(/<agreed[\\s\\S]{0,800}/i\); if \(assignedMatch || agreedMatch\) { console.log\('=== ACTIVE flight snippet ==='\); if \(assignedMatch\) console.log\('ASSIGNED:', assignedMatch[0]\); if \(agreedMatch\) console.log\('AGREED:', agreedMatch[0].substring\(0, 500\)\); dumped = true; } } }\); solace.connect\(\); setTimeout\(\(\) => process.exit\(0\), 12000\); ")

Bash(timeout 20 node -e " require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const SolaceClient = require\('./src/solace-client'\); const solace = new SolaceClient\({ host: process.env.FDPS_HOST, vpn: process.env.FDPS_VPN, username: process.env.FDPS_USERNAME, password: process.env.FDPS_PASSWORD, queue: process.env.FDPS_QUEUE, }\); let dumped = 0; solace.on\('message', \(payload, topic\) => { if \(typeof payload !== 'string'\) return; // Look for track messages with position data if \(dumped < 3 && \(topic.includes\('Track'\) || payload.includes\('position'\) || payload.includes\('pos>'\)\)\) { if \(payload.includes\('pos>'\) || payload.includes\('latitude'\) || payload.includes\('<x>'\)\) { console.log\('=== MSG ' + dumped + ' === Topic: ' + topic\); console.log\(payload.substring\(0, 3000\)\); console.log\(''\); dumped++; } } }\); solace.connect\(\); setTimeout\(\(\) => { if \(dumped === 0\) console.log\('No track position messages found'\); process.exit\(0\); }, 18000\); ")

Bash(timeout 20 node -e " require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const SolaceClient = require\('./src/solace-client'\); const { parseFixmMessage } = require\('./src/fixm-parser'\); const FlightStore = require\('./src/flight-store'\); const store = new FlightStore\(\); const solace = new SolaceClient\({ host: process.env.FDPS_HOST, vpn: process.env.FDPS_VPN, username: process.env.FDPS_USERNAME, password: process.env.FDPS_PASSWORD, queue: process.env.FDPS_QUEUE, }\); solace.on\('message', \(payload\) => { const plans = parseFixmMessage\(payload\); if \(!plans\) return; for \(const p of plans\) store.upsert\(p\); }\); solace.connect\(\); setTimeout\(\(\) => { const all = store.getAll\(\); let hasPos = 0, hasRoute = 0, hasType = 0, hasOriginDest = 0, hasAlt = 0, hasSpeed = 0, hasCallsign = 0; for \(const f of all\) { if \(f.lat != null\) hasPos++; if \(f.route\) hasRoute++; if \(f.aircraftType\) hasType++; if \(f.origin && f.destination\) hasOriginDest++; if \(f.actualAltitude || f.altitude\) hasAlt++; if \(f.groundSpeed || f.airspeed\) hasSpeed++; if \(f.callsign\) hasCallsign++; } console.log\('Total flights:', all.length\); console.log\('Has callsign:', hasCallsign, '\(' + Math.round\(hasCallsign/all.length*100\) + '%\)'\); console.log\('Has origin+dest:', hasOriginDest, '\(' + Math.round\(hasOriginDest/all.length*100\) + '%\)'\); console.log\('Has position:', hasPos, '\(' + Math.round\(hasPos/all.length*100\) + '%\)'\); console.log\('Has altitude:', hasAlt, '\(' + Math.round\(hasAlt/all.length*100\) + '%\)'\); console.log\('Has speed:', hasSpeed, '\(' + Math.round\(hasSpeed/all.length*100\) + '%\)'\); console.log\('Has aircraft type:', hasType, '\(' + Math.round\(hasType/all.length*100\) + '%\)'\); console.log\('Has route:', hasRoute, '\(' + Math.round\(hasRoute/all.length*100\) + '%\)'\); process.exit\(0\); }, 16000\); ")

Bash(timeout 20 node -e " require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const SolaceClient = require\('./src/solace-client'\); const solace = new SolaceClient\({ host: process.env.TFMS_HOST, vpn: process.env.TFMS_VPN, username: process.env.TFMS_USERNAME, password: process.env.TFMS_PASSWORD, queue: process.env.TFMS_QUEUE, }\); let dumped = 0; const topicTypes = new Set\(\); solace.on\('message', \(payload, topic\) => { topicTypes.add\(topic?.split\('/'\).slice\(0,3\).join\('/'\)\); if \(dumped < 3 && typeof payload === 'string'\) { console.log\('=== MSG ' + dumped + ' === Topic: ' + topic\); console.log\(payload.substring\(0, 3000\)\); console.log\(''\); dumped++; } }\); solace.connect\(\); setTimeout\(\(\) => { console.log\('Topic prefixes seen:', [...topicTypes].sort\(\).join\(', '\)\); process.exit\(0\); }, 16000\); ")

Bash(timeout 25 node -e " require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const SolaceClient = require\('./src/solace-client'\); const { parseFixmMessage } = require\('./src/fixm-parser'\); const { parseTfmsMessage } = require\('./src/tfms-parser'\); const FlightStore = require\('./src/flight-store'\); const store = new FlightStore\(\); const fdps = new SolaceClient\({ host: process.env.FDPS_HOST, vpn: process.env.FDPS_VPN, username: process.env.FDPS_USERNAME, password: process.env.FDPS_PASSWORD, queue: process.env.FDPS_QUEUE }\); const tfms = new SolaceClient\({ host: process.env.TFMS_HOST, vpn: process.env.TFMS_VPN, username: process.env.TFMS_USERNAME, password: process.env.TFMS_PASSWORD, queue: process.env.TFMS_QUEUE }\); fdps.on\('message', \(p\) => { const r = parseFixmMessage\(p\); if \(r\) r.forEach\(f => store.upsert\(f\)\); }\); tfms.on\('message', \(p\) => { const r = parseTfmsMessage\(p\); if \(r\) r.forEach\(f => store.upsert\(f\)\); }\); fdps.connect\(\); tfms.connect\(\); setTimeout\(\(\) => { const all = store.getAll\(\); let hasType = 0, hasAirline = 0, hasRoute = 0, hasTimes = 0; for \(const f of all\) { if \(f.aircraftType\) hasType++; if \(f.airline\) hasAirline++; if \(f.route\) hasRoute++; if \(f.gateOut || f.eta\) hasTimes++; } console.log\('Total:', all.length\); console.log\('Has aircraft type:', hasType, '\(' + Math.round\(hasType/all.length*100\) + '%\)'\); console.log\('Has airline:', hasAirline, '\(' + Math.round\(hasAirline/all.length*100\) + '%\)'\); console.log\('Has route:', hasRoute, '\(' + Math.round\(hasRoute/all.length*100\) + '%\)'\); console.log\('Has times:', hasTimes, '\(' + Math.round\(hasTimes/all.length*100\) + '%\)'\); process.exit\(0\); }, 20000\); ")

Bash(timeout 25 node -e " require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const SolaceClient = require\('./src/solace-client'\); const { parseFixmMessage } = require\('./src/fixm-parser'\); const { parseTfmsMessage } = require\('./src/tfms-parser'\); const FlightStore = require\('./src/flight-store'\); const store = new FlightStore\(\); const fdps = new SolaceClient\({ host: process.env.FDPS_HOST, vpn: process.env.FDPS_VPN, username: process.env.FDPS_USERNAME, password: process.env.FDPS_PASSWORD, queue: process.env.FDPS_QUEUE }\); const tfms = new SolaceClient\({ host: process.env.TFMS_HOST, vpn: process.env.TFMS_VPN, username: process.env.TFMS_USERNAME, password: process.env.TFMS_PASSWORD, queue: process.env.TFMS_QUEUE }\); fdps.on\('message', \(p\) => { const r = parseFixmMessage\(p\); if \(r\) r.forEach\(f => store.upsert\(f\)\); }\); tfms.on\('message', \(p\) => { const r = parseTfmsMessage\(p\); if \(r\) r.forEach\(f => store.upsert\(f\)\); }\); fdps.connect\(\); tfms.connect\(\); setTimeout\(\(\) => { const all = store.getAll\(\); const fields = ['callsign','origin','destination','lat','lon','actualAltitude','altitude','groundSpeed','airspeed','heading','aircraftType','route','centre','sector','airline','majorAirline','aircraftCategory','userCategory','flightType','flightStatus','gateOut','gateIn','wheelsOff','wheelsOn','etd','eta','computerId','gufi','fdpsGufi']; console.log\('Total flights:', all.length\); console.log\(''\); console.log\('Field coverage:'\); for \(const f of fields\) { const count = all.filter\(x => x[f] != null && x[f] !== ''\).length; const pct = Math.round\(count/all.length*100\); const bar = pct > 0 ? '█'.repeat\(Math.ceil\(pct/5\)\) : ''; console.log\(' ' + f.padEnd\(20\) + \(count+''\).padStart\(5\) + ' ' + \(pct+'%'\).padStart\(4\) + ' ' + bar\); } // Check statuses const statuses = {}; for \(const f of all\) { statuses[f.flightStatus || 'null'] = \(statuses[f.flightStatus || 'null'] || 0\) + 1; } console.log\(''\); console.log\('Flight statuses:', JSON.stringify\(statuses\)\); process.exit\(0\); }, 20000\); ")

Bash(timeout 20 node -e " require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const SolaceClient = require\('./src/solace-client'\); const { parseFixmMessage } = require\('./src/fixm-parser'\); const { parseTfmsMessage } = require\('./src/tfms-parser'\); const airports = {}; const airlines = {}; const fdps = new SolaceClient\({ host: process.env.FDPS_HOST, vpn: process.env.FDPS_VPN, username: process.env.FDPS_USERNAME, password: process.env.FDPS_PASSWORD, queue: process.env.FDPS_QUEUE }\); const tfms = new SolaceClient\({ host: process.env.TFMS_HOST, vpn: process.env.TFMS_VPN, username: process.env.TFMS_USERNAME, password: process.env.TFMS_PASSWORD, queue: process.env.TFMS_QUEUE }\); fdps.on\('message', \(p\) => { const r = parseFixmMessage\(p\); if \(!r\) return; for \(const f of r\) { if \(f.origin\) airports[f.origin] = \(airports[f.origin] || 0\) + 1; if \(f.destination\) airports[f.destination] = \(airports[f.destination] || 0\) + 1; if \(f.callsign\) { const m = f.callsign.match\(/^\([A-Z]+\)/\); if \(m\) airlines[m[1]] = \(airlines[m[1]] || 0\) + 1; } } }\); tfms.on\('message', \(p\) => { const r = parseTfmsMessage\(p\); if \(!r\) return; for \(const f of r\) { if \(f.airline\) airlines[f.airline] = \(airlines[f.airline] || 0\) + 1; } }\); fdps.connect\(\); tfms.connect\(\); setTimeout\(\(\) => { const topAirports = Object.entries\(airports\).sort\(\(a,b\) => b[1]-a[1]\).slice\(0, 80\).map\(e => e[0]\); const topAirlines = Object.entries\(airlines\).sort\(\(a,b\) => b[1]-a[1]\).slice\(0, 40\).map\(e => e[0]\); console.log\('TOP AIRPORTS:', JSON.stringify\(topAirports\)\); console.log\('TOP AIRLINES:', JSON.stringify\(topAirlines\)\); process.exit\(0\); }, 16000\); ")

Bash(timeout 15 node -e " require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const SolaceClient = require\('./src/solace-client'\); const fdps = new SolaceClient\({ host: process.env.FDPS_HOST, vpn: process.env.FDPS_VPN, username: process.env.FDPS_USERNAME, password: process.env.FDPS_PASSWORD, queue: process.env.FDPS_QUEUE }\); let withType = 0, without = 0, sample = false; fdps.on\('message', \(payload\) => { if \(typeof payload !== 'string'\) return; if \(payload.includes\('aircraftDescription'\) || payload.includes\('icaoModelIdentifier'\)\) { withType++; if \(!sample\) { const match = payload.match\(/<aircraftDescription[\\s\\S]*?<\\/aircraftDescription>/\); if \(match\) { console.log\('SAMPLE:', match[0].substring\(0, 500\)\); sample = true; } } } else { without++; } }\); fdps.connect\(\); setTimeout\(\(\) => { console.log\('FDPS msgs with aircraftDescription:', withType\); console.log\('FDPS msgs without:', without\); process.exit\(0\); }, 12000\); ")

Bash(timeout 15 node -e " require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const SolaceClient = require\('./src/solace-client'\); const fdps = new SolaceClient\({ host: process.env.FDPS_HOST, vpn: process.env.FDPS_VPN, username: process.env.FDPS_USERNAME, password: process.env.FDPS_PASSWORD, queue: process.env.FDPS_QUEUE }\); // Check what source types have aircraftDescription const sources = { with: {}, without: {} }; fdps.on\('message', \(payload\) => { if \(typeof payload !== 'string'\) return; const srcMatch = payload.match\(/source=\\"\(\\w+\)\\"/\); const src = srcMatch ? srcMatch[1] : 'unknown'; const has = payload.includes\('aircraftDescription'\); const bucket = has ? sources.with : sources.without; bucket[src] = \(bucket[src] || 0\) + 1; }\); fdps.connect\(\); setTimeout\(\(\) => { console.log\('WITH aircraftDescription by source:', JSON.stringify\(sources.with\)\); console.log\('WITHOUT by source:', JSON.stringify\(sources.without\)\); process.exit\(0\); }, 12000\); ")

Bash(timeout 15 node -e " require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const SolaceClient = require\('./src/solace-client'\); const { parseTfmsMessage } = require\('./src/tfms-parser'\); const tfms = new SolaceClient\({ host: process.env.TFMS_HOST, vpn: process.env.TFMS_VPN, username: process.env.TFMS_USERNAME, password: process.env.TFMS_PASSWORD, queue: process.env.TFMS_QUEUE }\); let withType = 0, total = 0; tfms.on\('message', \(payload\) => { const r = parseTfmsMessage\(payload\); if \(!r\) return; for \(const f of r\) { total++; if \(f.aircraftType\) withType++; } }\); tfms.connect\(\); setTimeout\(\(\) => { console.log\('TFMS parsed flights:', total\); console.log\('With aircraftType:', withType, '\(' + Math.round\(withType/total*100\) + '%\)'\); process.exit\(0\); }, 12000\); ")

Bash(timeout 15 node -e " require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const SolaceClient = require\('./src/solace-client'\); const { parseTfmsMessage } = require\('./src/tfms-parser'\); const tfms = new SolaceClient\({ host: process.env.TFMS_HOST, vpn: process.env.TFMS_VPN, username: process.env.TFMS_USERNAME, password: process.env.TFMS_PASSWORD, queue: process.env.TFMS_QUEUE }\); const seen = new Set\(\); tfms.on\('message', \(payload\) => { const r = parseTfmsMessage\(payload\); if \(!r\) return; for \(const f of r\) { if \(f.airline && f.majorAirline && f.airline !== f.majorAirline && !seen.has\(f.airline\)\) { seen.add\(f.airline\); console.log\(f.callsign, '| airline:', f.airline, '| major \(dba\):', f.majorAirline\); } } }\); tfms.connect\(\); setTimeout\(\(\) => process.exit\(0\), 12000\); ")

Bash(timeout 15 node -e " require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const SolaceClient = require\('./src/solace-client'\); const { parseTfmsMessage } = require\('./src/tfms-parser'\); const tfms = new SolaceClient\({ host: process.env.TFMS_HOST, vpn: process.env.TFMS_VPN, username: process.env.TFMS_USERNAME, password: process.env.TFMS_PASSWORD, queue: process.env.TFMS_QUEUE }\); let shown = 0; tfms.on\('message', \(payload\) => { const r = parseTfmsMessage\(payload\); if \(!r\) return; for \(const f of r\) { if \(shown < 5 && \(f.gateOut || f.wheelsOff || f.wheelsOn || f.gateIn || f.etd || f.eta\)\) { console.log\(f.callsign, { gateOut: f.gateOut, wheelsOff: f.wheelsOff, wheelsOn: f.wheelsOn, gateIn: f.gateIn, etd: f.etd, etdType: f.etdType, eta: f.eta, etaType: f.etaType, }\); shown++; } } }\); tfms.connect\(\); setTimeout\(\(\) => process.exit\(0\), 12000\); ")

Bash(timeout 15 node -e " require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const SolaceClient = require\('./src/solace-client'\); const { XMLParser } = require\('fast-xml-parser'\); const parser = new XMLParser\({ ignoreAttributes: false, attributeNamePrefix: '@_', removeNSPrefix: true }\); const tfms = new SolaceClient\({ host: process.env.TFMS_HOST, vpn: process.env.TFMS_VPN, username: process.env.TFMS_USERNAME, password: process.env.TFMS_PASSWORD, queue: process.env.TFMS_QUEUE }\); let shown = 0; tfms.on\('message', \(payload\) => { if \(typeof payload !== 'string' || shown >= 5\) return; if \(!payload.includes\('originalDeparture'\)\) return; const match = payload.match\(/flightTimeData[^>]*/\); if \(match\) { console.log\(match[0]\); shown++; } }\); tfms.connect\(\); setTimeout\(\(\) => process.exit\(0\), 12000\); ")

Bash(timeout 20 node -e " require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const SolaceClient = require\('./src/solace-client'\); const { parseFixmMessage } = require\('./src/fixm-parser'\); const { parseTfmsMessage } = require\('./src/tfms-parser'\); const fdps = new SolaceClient\({ host: process.env.FDPS_HOST, vpn: process.env.FDPS_VPN, username: process.env.FDPS_USERNAME, password: process.env.FDPS_PASSWORD, queue: process.env.FDPS_QUEUE }\); const tfms = new SolaceClient\({ host: process.env.TFMS_HOST, vpn: process.env.TFMS_VPN, username: process.env.TFMS_USERNAME, password: process.env.TFMS_PASSWORD, queue: process.env.TFMS_QUEUE }\); // Look for AAL flights and compare GUFIs const fdpsGufis = new Map\(\); const tfmsGufis = new Map\(\); fdps.on\('message', \(p\) => { const r = parseFixmMessage\(p\); if \(!r\) return; for \(const f of r\) { if \(f.callsign && f.callsign.startsWith\('AAL'\) && f.fdpsGufi\) { fdpsGufis.set\(f.callsign, { fdpsGufi: f.fdpsGufi, gufi: f.gufi }\); } } }\); tfms.on\('message', \(p\) => { const r = parseTfmsMessage\(p\); if \(!r\) return; for \(const f of r\) { if \(f.callsign && f.callsign.startsWith\('AAL'\) && f.fdpsGufi\) { tfmsGufis.set\(f.callsign, { fdpsGufi: f.fdpsGufi }\); } } }\); fdps.connect\(\); tfms.connect\(\); setTimeout\(\(\) => { // Find flights in both let shown = 0; for \(const [cs, tfms] of tfmsGufis\) { const fdps = fdpsGufis.get\(cs\); if \(fdps && shown < 5\) { console.log\(cs, '| FDPS fdpsGufi:', fdps.fdpsGufi, '| FDPS gufi:', fdps.gufi, '| TFMS fdpsGufi:', tfms.fdpsGufi\); shown++; } } if \(shown === 0\) console.log\('No overlapping AAL flights found in this window'\); process.exit\(0\); }, 16000\); ")
